scripts.check: npm run protocol:check && npm run electron:check && npm run runtime:check
scripts.electron:build: npm run protocol:build && npm run runtime:build && npm --prefix packages/electron-app run build && npm --prefix packages/electron-app run build:electron
scripts.cli:build: npm run protocol:build && npm run runtime:build && npm --prefix packages/cli run build
scripts.test:happy: cd apps/scout && bun run test:happy && cd ../../packages/electron-app && bun run test:happy && cd ../cli && bun run test:happy
scripts.runtime:build: npm run protocol:build && npm --prefix packages/runtime run build
scripts.site:build: cd site && bun install && bun run build
scripts.site:dev: cd site && bun install && bun run dev
